embeds.title: 18+ Only
embeds.description:
This is an **NSFW Erotic Role Play** server in a DnD setting. Expect to see horny people and explicit sexual content. If this makes you uncomfortable, this is not the server for you.

You, and any characters you play, must be 18+, regardless of your local age of consent or the age of maturity of your chosen race. We don't care that some DnD races mature before 18 years, you still have to make your character 18+ (100+ for Elves). Do not even joke about being underage. If you are found to be under the age of 18 you will be banned. In rare cases, a Staff member can send you a direct message and may ask for age verification. While you are not obliged to verify yourself, refusal to do so may result in a ban.

Per Discord Community Guidelines, any sexually explicit content involving a character, fictional or nonfictional, under 18 is strictly prohibited. Any characters that are, or appear to be, underage (lolicon, shotacon, cubs, etc.) will not be tolerated. Depictions of such characters as fully matured adults are acceptable, but may be flagged and removed at the discretion of the staff. Anime faceclaims often fall afoul of this rule - due to the art style, many anime faceclaims appear underage, and many anime characters are canonically underage and will be rejected as such.

For the safety and security of our members, please keep all NSFW content in the NSFW channels. Any dubious images will be removed at the discretion of the staff. Repeat offenders will be issued a warning and possibly banned.

embeds.title: No Harassment
embeds.description:
We strive to be an inclusive community, and are LGBTQ+ friendly. We will not tolerate harassment or discrimination. This includes, but is not limited to: discrimination based on race, gender, sexual identity or orientation, slurs, kink shaming, repeated unwanted contact or unwelcome advances, doxing, or stalking.
This is not an IRL dating app. Demanding pics or asking for personal information is creepy and stalkery. Just don't.

Any violation, abuse, or harassment will be subject to a warning & possible ban.

fields.name: DMs
fields.value: Do not slide into anyone's DMs without permission of the intended person (the <@&765602999703568385> role is considered implicit permission). If they do not have this role, ask first in general chat if you may DM them. If they refuse, don’t push.

fields.name: Pings
fields.value: Keep your pings - whether towards an individual or a group - to a minimum. We all have lives off Discord. Don't be a dick and demand their attention unless they have given you explicit permission to ping them (such as when replying to a scene). Do not ping individuals for RP unless they have specifically stated in the proper channel that they were looking for roleplaying. That's just rude.

embeds.title: Be Respectful
embeds.description: Be respectful your partners' limits. Do not be afraid to be vocal about your limits to your partner. They are expected to respect you and make adjustments accordingly. Conversely, do not kink shame. If you aren't into something, inform your partner to adjust the scene or end the RP, but do so respectfully.

fields.name: Sensitive Content
fields.value: Be considerate of the community's limits and keep any potentially triggering content (including, but not limited to, extreme kinks such as depictions of graphic sexual violence) behind `||spoiler tags||` to black it out (||like this||) and include an OOC content warning.

fields.name: Safe"words"
fields.value:
We have instituted community-wide safe-emoji. If a scene in which you are involved is moving into potentially limit territory, you may use one of the following to quickly convey to your partner your OOC feelings on the direction of the roleplay. Of course, this should not replace communicating with your partner, but can supplement it.
✅ (`:white_check_mark:`) or 🆗 (`:ok:`) - This is good/I like this/keep going.
⚠️(`:warning:`) - This is getting close to my limit territory. Please tone it down.
🛑(`:octagonal_sign:`) or ❌ (`:x:`) - Safeword. I do not like this. Stop immediately

embeds.title: Consent is Key
embeds.description: This may be an extension of respecting your limits and no harassment, but it bears special mention. Any play involving Non-Con/Rape, mental effects that remove consent, sexual violence, or other such potentially triggering topics MUST be discussed with your partner beforehand and be EXPLICITLY consented to.

fields.name: Pet/Owner, Dom/Sub
fields.value: All such relationships must likewise receive the consent of both parties, and be ended immediately at the request of either party. Regardless of the progression of roleplay here: no one is owned by, nor obligated to anyone else.

fields.name: Enforced Exclusivity
fields.value: Everyone is here to have fun, and its up to each player who they choose to play with or not. Any attempts to coerce, force, guilt, threaten, or otherwise encourage a player to role-play exclusively with you will not be tolerated, nor will attempts to discourage others from roleplaying with an individual. This includes any attempt to create, or talk of creating, a harem.

embeds.title: Sensitive Topics
embeds.description:
Certain topics are sensitive and potentially inflammatory. In an effort to keep the peace on the server, certain topics should be avoided in general OOC conversation. Real-life Politics and Religion are the most common topics at the center of contention and should not be discussed. In-character politics and religion are permitted, provided it remains civil.

Subjects such as depression, suicide, and self-harm can also be sensitive for some members and should also be avoided. This is not a professional therapy environment, and our members are not licensed to act as therapists (and, if they are, should not be expected to do so for free or in their off-hours).

[If you need immediate help, there are numbers you can call](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_suicide_crisis_lines)

embeds.title: No Generated AI Content
embeds.description:
Our community loves and supports artists who work tirelessly to produce the works we love, both within our community, and those whose work we appreciate and share in our image channels. The simple fact is that AI hurts artists and threatens their livelihood - especially smaller, independent artists. AI models are trained on huge datasets that include scraped art from real artists without consent or credit. It systemically devalues the creative labor, with no appreciation of the hours of effort taken by artists to learn and refine their skills.

Avoid posting AI images in chat channels. Characters using AI image references will not be approved, and you may be asked to change your reference image if it slips through. If already approved using AI images, we strongly encourage you to replace it with human-made art.

Mistakes can and will happen. Please be respectful, both when pointing out others' use of AI or if it is pointed out to you. See rule :three:

Similarly, don't use ChatGPT to write your RP posts. This server is created to interact and roleplay with a community of people, not with an AI.

embeds.title: Staff's Word is Law
embeds.description:
If an admin or moderator asks you to drop a subject, drop it. If you feel a mod has abused their power, you may contact another mod or the server owner to discuss the situation. Failure to comply with the rules will result in a first warning, and possibly a kick/ban depending of the gravity of the act. If you are being disruptive to the server or other members within it, "It isn't in the rules" is not a valid excuse. The staff, at their own discretion, has the right to kick a user if they're found to be a bad fit for the server's community.

DM's have leeway at their table to make rule calls. If you disagree with their decision, approach the situation respectfully. Arguing is likely to see you blacklisted from future table sessions. If you and your DM cannot come to an agreement, you may bring it to the attention of another DM or a Moderator, and the staff will discuss how to move forward.

embeds.title: Just Don't Be a Dick
embeds.description:
You can have a dick. You can enjoy dick. But don’t **be** a dick.
We strive to have a friendly community, and actions that make other members feel uncomfortable will not be tolerated. We're all here to have fun, the mod team included, and nobody needs to deal with internet drama on top of real world things. We expect everyone to be polite, respectful, and kind to all members. Those who are rude, antagonistic, or creepy will be warned and potentially banned if they consistently violate this rule.
